source: level-7 exact-to-zero run plus level-8 focused small-g recomputation
small_g_route: original (x,p) reducer with instanton-rescaled eta/rho search

level8_probe_config.special_case: g=0.25 x2 used a widened 5-point edge scan; best point remained optimal_inaccurate

note: Below roughly g~0.021 the instanton scale underflows in double precision.
